scripts.docker:build:base: docker build -f docker/base/api/Dockerfile . -t hotelhub-base-api:local && docker build -f docker/base/web/Dockerfile . -t hotelhub-base-web:local && docker build -f docker/base/mobile/Dockerfile . -t hotelhub-base-mobile:local
scripts.docker:build:services: docker build -f docker/api/Dockerfile --build-arg BASE_API_IMAGE=hotelhub-base-api:local . -t hotelhub-api:local && docker build -f docker/web/Dockerfile --build-arg BASE_WEB_IMAGE=hotelhub-base-web:local --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=/api/v1 . -t hotelhub-web:local
scripts.docker:build:all: npm run docker:build:base && npm run docker:build:services && npm run docker:build:mobile-builder
scripts.docker:up: npm run docker:build:base && npm run docker:build:services && docker compose up -d db redis api web nginx
